title: helichrysum retortum
intro: Helichrysum retortum, also known as the Cape yellow, is a plant species within the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern parts of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum retortum are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as geraniol and nerol. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. Helichrysum retortum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
